message:
chore(engine): rustfmt formatting for controller composition matrix and execution orchestrator

Apply standard rustfmt reformatting across three files:

- controller_composition_matrix.rs: Reorder imports alphabetically
  (EngineObjectId before derive_id), reformat assert!() macros to use
  the multi-line indented style instead of method-chain-in-assert for
  8 test assertions involving .iter().any() patterns.

- controller_composition_matrix_integration.rs: Reorder use-item imports
  alphabetically (types before functions), reformat 10+ assert!() macros
  to multi-line style, adjust return-type line break for
  emit_controller_operator_graph_artifacts_if_configured(), fix stray
  comment alignment (C(5,2) = 10 line).

- execution_orchestrator.rs: Reformat Ir3Module::new() call-site in
  estimate_ir3_schedule_cost_fail_closes_on_looping_control_flow test
  to standard let-binding line wrapping.

No logic changes — purely mechanical formatting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
